name: Mocha Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter, cut into 8 pieces and brought to room temperature
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Melt 1/2 cup of the chocolate chips in a double boiler over barely simmering water (or using a microwave).
3. Transfer the melted chocolate to a food processor.
4. Add all remaining ingredients except the unmelted chocolate chips and blend well for about 20 seconds.
5. Stir in the remaining chocolate chips.
6. Drop heaping tablespoons of the dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake until set, about 15 minutes.
8. Cool on the cookie sheets for 2 to 3 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
9. Serve at room temperature.
